name: airstream
description: WiFi Audio Streamer - Stream Windows system audio to iOS Safari/AirPods

scripts.stop: taskkill /F /IM ffmpeg.exe 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM wasapi-capture.exe 2>nul & for /f "tokens=5" %a in ('netstat -ano ^| findstr :3000 ^| findstr LISTENING') do taskkill /F /PID %a 2>nul
